subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! That which thou hast written hath been noted, and numerous letters have been penned. Therefore, beyond this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء آنچه مرقوم نمودی ملحوظ گشت و مکاتیب متعدده مرقوم شد لهذا بیش از
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
